headline: Uber’s $11.6 Billion Bid for DoorDash Rival Is About Future Proofing It From Robots
summary: Uber Technologies  is hungry for a deal.  The ride-hailing company has offered to buy Germany’s  Delivery Hero  for around $11.6 billion, but could be forced to go higher as the food-delivery market consolidates around a few big players.  Delivery Hero confirmed over the weekend that Uber had made a 33 euros ($38.40)-a-share offer for the entire company.

content.title: Uber’s $11.6 Billion Bid for DoorDash Rival Is About Future Proofing It From Robots
content.summary: Uber Technologies  is hungry for a deal. Delivery Hero confirmed over the weekend that Uber had made a 33 euros ($38.40)-a-share offer for the entire company.

headline: Funnel launches Digital Measurement, a new category of MMM software to reconcile competing measurement methodologies
summary: The platform is a framework for calibrating between marketing mix modeling, multi-touch attribution and ad platform data. Modern marketing measurement is shifting beyond fragmented attribution models and static reporting systems as advertisers look for more reliable ways to measure performance. By combining marketing mix modeling, attribution, and platform data, marketers can gain a clearer understanding of incremental impact and make more informed growth decisions in a privacy-first digital lan

headline: Payam Music Announces Partnership with Music Legend Hans Zimmer and Bleeding Fingers Music and Funding from Tech Executives to Expand Award-Winning Piano Schools
summary: Payam Music, the innovative music education school transforming the way students learn piano, has announced a partnership with music legend Hans Zimmer as well as successfully raised funding from top tech and media executives, including entrepreneur Mark Cuban, Dara Khosrowshahi (CEO of Uber), Michelle Zatlyn (Co-founder, President & Co-Chair of Cloudflare), and Drew Houston (CEO of Dropbox). headline: Uber Misrepresented Its Insurance Structure To Legislature To Get Reduced Uninsured Motorist Coverage; Report Requires Answers From Uber, Consumer Watchdog Says
summary: Consumer Watchdog today called on leaders in the California legislature to get answers from Uber about why it didn't disclose that the vast majority of its insurance payments are self-funded and it has amassed a huge reserve of $12.5 billion.

content.title: Uber Misrepresented Its Insurance Structure To Legislature To Get Reduced Uninsured Motorist Coverage; Report Requires Answers From Uber, Consumer Watchdog Says
content.summary: Consumer Watchdog today called on leaders in the California legislature to get answers from Uber about why it didn't disclose that the vast majority of its insurance payments are self-funded and it has amassed a huge reserve of $12.5 billion.

headline: Is Uber’s Expanded US$500 Million Robotaxi Deal Altering The Investment Case For Lucid Group (LCID)?
summary: Earlier this year, Lucid Group announced that Uber will increase its total investment to US$500 million and expand its purchase commitment to at least 35,000 Lucid vehicles for a future global robotaxi service, alongside a separate US$550 million injection from an affiliate of Saudi Arabia’s Public Investment Fund. This combination of larger fleet orders and fresh capital highlights Lucid’s emerging role as a supplier for autonomous mobility infrastructure while bolstering its funding base...

headline: Uber CEO, COO sends stark message on AI spending in 2026

headline: Uber burned through its entire 2026 AI budget in four months. Now its COO is questioning whether it’s worth it
summary: The rideshare giant's COO says “it’s very hard to draw a line” between rising AI costs and useful features for customers.

content.title: Uber burned through its entire 2026 AI budget in four months. Now its COO is questioning whether it’s worth it
content.summary: The rideshare giant's COO says “it’s very hard to draw a line” between rising AI costs and useful features for customers.
